Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default
Off Calendar Jun-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jessica Takanao, Esq. 925-746-7770 of Donahue Fitzgerald for Defendant ARIZONA TEMPE HOTEL CORPORATION AND CRESLEIGH MANAGEMENT, INC.through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ARIZONA TEMPE HOTEL CORPORATION AND CRESLEIGH MANAGEMENT, INC.'S Motion To Set Aside Default.

Defendants Arizona Temple Corporation and Cresleigh Management, Inc.'s motion to set aside the defaults entered against them on October 24, 2017 is granted. The defaults are now vacated. Moving defendants have shown that they are entitled to the relief they seek per CCP 473(b). Very slight evidence is required to support vacating defaults and doing so comports with California's strong policy of deciding cases on their merits. (Shamblain v. Brattain (1988) 44 Cal. 3d 474, 478). Nor has plaintiff Golden State Broadcasting, LLC shown that it would suffer any legal prejudice by the granting of the motion.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
